summary: Completed testing of new features: Real-time Collaboration (WebSocket sessions), Advanced Scenario Templates (14 pre-built templates), Market Data (Economic indicators, pension forecasts), and Mobile CSS improvements. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed Advanced Scenario Templates section visible with 9 template cards in Scenarios tab. Templates are clickable and apply changes.

issues: Compliance modal blocks initial mobile view - requires user acceptance before accessing app content. This is expected behavior for compliance purposes.

seed_data_creation: Collaboration sessions created during testing are stored in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Real-time Collaboration - POST /api/collaboration/sessions/create, GET /api/collaboration/sessions/{id}, GET /api/collaboration/sessions, WebSocket at /api/collaboration/ws/{session_id}. 2) Scenario Templates - GET /api/scenario-templates/list (14 templates), GET /api/scenario-templates/{id}, POST /api/scenario-templates/{id}/apply, GET /api/scenario-templates/categories. 3) Market Data - GET /api/market/economic-indicators, GET /api/market/super-performance, GET /api/market/pension-rates/history, GET /api/market/pension-rates/forecast. Frontend Scenarios tab shows Advanced Scenario Templates section with 9 visible template cards. Mobile CSS improvements added to index.css (lines 212+).

realtime_collaboration.create_session: PASS - POST /api/collaboration/sessions/create returns session_id and join_url
realtime_collaboration.get_session: PASS - GET /api/collaboration/sessions/{id} returns session info with status
realtime_collaboration.list_sessions: PASS - GET /api/collaboration/sessions returns list of active sessions

scenario_templates.list_all: PASS - GET /api/scenario-templates/list returns 14 templates with categories
scenario_templates.list_by_category: PASS - Filtering by category works correctly
scenario_templates.apply_template: PASS - POST /api/scenario-templates/{id}/apply adjusts user inputs correctly
scenario_templates.list_categories: PASS - Returns 5 categories: retirement_timing, career_break, windfall, lifestyle_change, risk_scenario

market_data.economic_indicators: PASS - Returns cash_rate, inflation_cpi, unemployment, gdp_growth, 10yr_bond
market_data.super_performance: PASS - Returns growth, balanced, conservative, high_growth fund benchmarks
market_data.pension_history: PASS - Returns historical pension rate changes with dates
market_data.pension_forecast: PASS - Returns forecasted rates based on inflation assumption

mobile_css.mobile_styles: PASS - Mobile responsive CSS added at line 212+ in index.css

frontend_scenarios_tab.templates_section: PASS - Advanced Scenario Templates section visible
frontend_scenarios_tab.templates_clickable: PASS - Templates are clickable and apply changes
frontend_scenarios_tab.quick_adjustments: PASS - Quick Adjustments section visible with preset buttons

mocked_apis.note: Economic indicators and pension rates are based on 2024 figures (not live API feeds). WebSocket collaboration uses in-memory state management.
